use_cases: Display customer testimonials with photos on landing pages
Showcase social proof to build trust with potential customers
Feature user quotes in review or testimonial sections
Highlight customer success stories with attribution
Create visually appealing testimonial grids on marketing pages
ai_summary: A dark-themed testimonial card component featuring a user photo with gradient overlay, customer quote with attribution, and gradient-accented role text. Includes smooth hover animation on the image for visual feedback. Designed for showcasing social proof on landing pages and marketing sections.
